languages.text: "Сейчас же прекратите! Каждая жизнь на счету!"

traits.locale_text: "Сейчас же прекратите! Каждая жизнь на счету!"

languages.text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"
languages.original_text: "Сейчас же прекратите! Каждая жизнь на счету!"

traits.locale_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such waste of life!"
"I will have you both shot if you do not cease this madness at once!"
"Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"
"I will have you both shot if you do not cease this madness at once!"
"Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such waste of life!"
"Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

languages.text: “立刻停止这种疯狂行为！我们不该这样白白糟蹋生命！”
languages.original_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

traits.locale_text: “立刻停止这种疯狂行为！我们不该这样白白糟蹋生命！”

languages.text: "Bu deliliğe derhâl son verin! Böyle bir can israfını göze alamayız!"
languages.original_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

traits.locale_text: "Bu deliliğe derhâl son verin! Böyle bir can israfını göze alamayız!"

languages.text: « Cessez immédiatement cette folie ! Nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de gaspiller des vies. »
languages.original_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

traits.locale_text: « Cessez immédiatement cette folie ! Nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de gaspiller des vies. »

languages.text: «¡Detengan ya esta locura! ¡No podemos desperdiciar así la vida!».
languages.original_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Detengan ya esta locura! ¡No podemos desperdiciar así la vida!».

languages.text: "Stoppt sofort diesen Wahnsinn! Wir können uns eine solche Vergeudung von Leben nicht leisten!"
languages.original_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

traits.locale_text: "Stoppt sofort diesen Wahnsinn! Wir können uns eine solche Vergeudung von Leben nicht leisten!"

languages.text: 「この狂気を今すぐ止めてください！こんな無駄な命の犠牲は払えません！」
languages.original_text: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"

traits.locale_text: 「この狂気を今すぐ止めてください！こんな無駄な命の犠牲は払えません！」
